src/test/java/org/acme/GreetingResourceT.general_idea: Change the HTTP GET request path from '/hello/world' to '/hello' to match the updated resource endpoint.
Update the expected response body from 'Hola world' to 'Hello World' to match the new endpoint behavior.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler release property to target Java 21.
Upgrade the Quarkus platform BOM to version 3.19.4 to support Java 21 and modern APIs.
Replace the deprecated RESTEasy Classic dependency with the new Quarkus REST (RESTEasy Reactive) dependencies.
Add explicit Jackson JSON provider dependency for the new REST implementation.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.jvm.general_idea: Switch the Docker base image from UBI8/OpenJDK 11 to UBI9/OpenJDK 21 to align with the target Java version.
Migrate JVM startup options from JAVA_OPTS to JAVA_OPTS_APPEND to prevent overriding default tuning provided by the new container entrypoint script.
Explicitly define the entrypoint to use the standard JBoss container run-java.sh script for proper JVM lifecycle management.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.legacy-jar.general_idea: Switch the Docker base image from UBI8 OpenJDK 11 to UBI9 OpenJDK 21 to align with the target Java version.
Adopt the standard JBoss container entrypoint script to handle Java runtime configuration and startup.
